placements.overview:
Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati is an institute. Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati offers a total of 17 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 6 specialisations such as Bakery & Confectionery, Food & Beverage Service, Food Production, Front Office Management and House Keeping. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM, BBA, After 10th Diploma and MHMTT in Full Time mode. Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 90,000 to 3,00,000. Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati has an annual seat intake of 240 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Hospitality & Travel. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Hospitality & Travel. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MHMTT. Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Assam Institute of Hotel Management, Guwahati courses stands around INR 90,000 to 3,00,000.

reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college in Amravati.

review_content.Placements: The college provides the best and highest package placement and also provides stipend-based internships. About 80% of students were placed last year, with companies like Infosys and TCS visiting our college. Overall, the college provides the best placement and internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs are best with a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are big and fresh. All classroom contains AC and a projector. The college contains different types of seminar halls. There are sports events every year. A medical room is present in each building.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges but needs improvement in curriculum and placements for core branch.

review_content.Placements: About 25% to 30% of students get placements in civil engineering. You have to maintain about 7.5 CGPA for at least enrollment in placements but most companies that come to our college are IT companies. There are only 2 to 3 companies for special civil branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen in our college is good and the price is also reasonable. There are Wi-Fi facilities for students but only in the library. In every classroom, a projector is available for PPT slides. But the biggest drawback is that no hostel is available in college, you have to find a private hostel or rooms.

review_summary.college_name: Ram Meghe College of Engineering Amravati Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: We will find that the subject they are teaching in the course is useless.

content.Placements: Not every student gets placed. The chance of getting placed is almost 30-40 percent. The highest package offered ranges from 12-14 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The lowest package offered to students is 1 LPA, which is not good in this economy. It is very hard to get a placement.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in college when I joined. The infrastructure needs to improve. Classrooms are of an old type, like houses in the old Japanese movies. The campus doesn't feel like we are in college, and it needs to improve a lot in the next few years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College has the natural environment and also it has excellent facilities.

content.Placements: Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, IBM, and others regularly recruit from campus. In IT, placement rates claim around 70-90% placement, with average salaries ranging from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top packages going up to 7.5 LPA. These are the reviews of my branch of information technology.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure generally gets good reviews like AC classrooms, projectors, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a clean library space. Some students mention a spacious and well-maintained campus with active extracurricular and sports facilities. There is no hostel facility for boys.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college in Amravati.

content.Placements: The college provides the best and highest package placement and also provides stipend-based internships. About 80% of students were placed last year, with companies like Infosys and TCS visiting our college. Overall, the college provides the best placement and internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our labs are best with a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are big and fresh. All classroom contains AC and a projector. The college contains different types of seminar halls. There are sports events every year. A medical room is present in each building.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges but needs improvement in curriculum and placements for core branch.

content.Placements: About 25% to 30% of students get placements in civil engineering. You have to maintain about 7.5 CGPA for at least enrollment in placements but most companies that come to our college are IT companies. There are only 2 to 3 companies for special civil branches.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen in our college is good and the price is also reasonable. There are Wi-Fi facilities for students but only in the library. In every classroom, a projector is available for PPT slides. But the biggest drawback is that no hostel is available in college, you have to find a private hostel or rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent and average in all aspects.

content.Placements: In our college, a 7.5 CGPA is the eligibility criteria for selection in campus placements. Many good companies like TCS, Wipro, Infotech, and Infosys come to recruit students for placements. They offer good packages to students. One of the best salary packages I have ever known is 45 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good college campus with fully furnished classrooms and well-equipped laboratories. We have a good Wi-Fi system with high-speed connectivity. In our college, we have a well-maintained library. An ambulance is available for emergency. Every year, Mitra championship is conducted through college.

description: Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management cutoff 2024 based on MHT CET scores has been concluded. The cutoff was concluded across multiple specialisations in the BE/BTech courses. Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera MHT CET cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the MHT CET 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera can check the previous three years' category-wise cutoff by clicking the links below:

Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 192291 and 300146 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 192291, B.E. in Electrical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 335965.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 192291.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 70.26 and 82.88, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 82.88. Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 82.88. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 76.93 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Prof Ram Meghe College of Engineering and Management, Badnera for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

hostel_campus.college_name: Ram Meghe College of Engineering Amravati Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: We will find that the subject they are teaching in the course is useless.
reviews.review_text: There was no hostel in college when I joined. The infrastructure needs to improve. Classrooms are of an old type, like houses in the old Japanese movies. The campus doesn't feel like we are in college, and it needs to improve a lot in the next few years.

reviews.review_heading: College has the natural environment and also it has excellent facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure generally gets good reviews like AC classrooms, projectors, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a clean library space. Some students mention a spacious and well-maintained campus with active extracurricular and sports facilities. There is no hostel facility for boys.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Amravati.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are best with a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are big and fresh. All classroom contains AC and a projector. The college contains different types of seminar halls. There are sports events every year. A medical room is present in each building.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges but needs improvement in curriculum and placements for core branch.
reviews.review_text: The canteen in our college is good and the price is also reasonable. There are Wi-Fi facilities for students but only in the library. In every classroom, a projector is available for PPT slides. But the biggest drawback is that no hostel is available in college, you have to find a private hostel or rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Decent and average in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: There is a good college campus with fully furnished classrooms and well-equipped laboratories. We have a good Wi-Fi system with high-speed connectivity. In our college, we have a well-maintained library. An ambulance is available for emergency. Every year, Mitra championship is conducted through college.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good in college.
reviews.review_text: My college, Proof Ram Megha College of Engineering and Management, is a good college for teaching. Facilities and infrastructure are available in our department, and they are good. Many facilities and infrastructure are available, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library. The food in the canteen is good, and many sporting events are held.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, good infrastructure, good placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only in the lab. The library is spacious but has no AC. Classrooms are small and clean. The college provides bus service for girls, but there is no boys' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides separate computer laboratories for all departments. It also has a canteen. There is a huge library and a garden. Parking area is available separately for girls, boys, and staff members.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Computer laboratory, library, electrical laboratory, civil laboratory, mechanical equipment, sports equipment, etc., were available in our college. Chemistry laboratory was good. The food served in the canteen was better. We can also play many games like cricket, badminton, and tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with learning outcomes.
reviews.review_text: The only first-year department is well infrastructure and well furnished even the lab are good but when you come to the department it is the worst no ACs, only a few computers work no proper Wi-Fi connection, even the projectors are not working on which they teach us.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Prof Ram Meghe college.
reviews.review_text: Our college library has so many books to study that is more than 5000. Extracurricular activities are also held. College hostel is good with the best infrastructure. They provide all the facilities like a cooler, fan, food, and water supply. Hostel has a security guard.

reviews.review_heading: Great college in Amravati with disciplined academics and good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college overall has good infrastructure and provides necessary facilities to the students. The classrooms are equipped with Projector screens for digital learning, and also every classroom is Air Conditioned. Labs are well-equipped with the necessary tools. The canteen of the college is one of the best places to be in, the food served is tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college to get admission in computer science engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that great. No hostel is provided for boys, i.e., students live in the expensive rooms 3-4 km from college. There is only one building for computer department and electronics department.

reviews.review_heading: It's a decent college. If you don't get admission to old Ram Meghe, then this is for you.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very great here. There is no hostel for men, so they have to rent a room near the college, which is 2 to 3 km away. If you want a good flat, then it is 5 to 6 km away from the college. In our college, there's one building for our computer department including the electronic engineering department.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure. The hostel is available for girls in the city, and we have a bus facility for girls. CSE computer lab is good. There is a canteen on our campus. Each branch has its building like the CSE department and civil department. The infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: The internship opportunities for students are very nice. Top recruiters are TCS and Wipro, etc. Companies provide internships for students. The stipend is 10,000 per month. faqs.answer: Sree Venkateswara College Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are really good, but the faculty is somewhat disappointing.

content.Placements: Sree Venkateswara College has a dedicated training and placement cell that plays a crucial role in preparing students for the corporate world. The placement cell offers various services such as soft skills development, coding practice, and resume building. These activities are conducted throughout the academic year.
content.Infrastructure: I must say the infrastructure is impressive. The campus is peaceful and filled with greenery, which makes it a great environment to study. Now, coming to the hostel, rooms are shared by 5-7 students, with basic furniture like common bathrooms. Hygiene is better in the girls' hostel than in the boys' hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. It has really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are no placements for 3 years. I am from the 2021 to 2025 batch. It needs to improve a lot of things in the college. First, they need to change the placement cell faculty members. It needs to hire some good faculty members in every engineering college. Placement cell faculty members play a major role in college growth.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in the college. There are a lot of signal problems. Sometimes, we face a lot of water problems, especially in washrooms and toilets. Sometimes, a lot of monkeys roam inside the college and grab the carriage boxes of students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sree Venkateswara College Of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are really good, but the faculty is somewhat disappointing.
reviews.review_text: I must say the infrastructure is impressive. The campus is peaceful and filled with greenery, which makes it a great environment to study. Now, coming to the hostel, rooms are shared by 5-7 students, with basic furniture like common bathrooms. Hygiene is better in the girls' hostel than in the boys' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. It has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the college. There are a lot of signal problems. Sometimes, we face a lot of water problems, especially in washrooms and toilets. Sometimes, a lot of monkeys roam inside the college and grab the carriage boxes of students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sree Venkateswara College Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The food quality is good—sufficient to eat, though not very rich. The hostel registration process is easy; you can fill out the registration form at the reception. Near the college, there are also rented rooms available for those who prefer not to stay in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Nellore svcn college review
reviews.review_text: I chose this course because we can go both hardware and software, very high scopes to get job in hardware like vlsi and embedded systems etc. The qualification of the faculty like mtech PhD etc. Every week they conduct exams, sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, it's a good college because of the value for money.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is very nice; they teach like friends and care well. However, some faculty members are not as good. The infrastructure is good for me, and the labs are also well-equipped. The college is developing like a university. The quality of food is okay—not very good, but acceptable. Sports and games are conducted well.

reviews.review_heading: SVCN Nellore review NLR.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is generally good for teaching, although some faculty members are not as effective. Most of the faculty interact with students like friends, but some can be strict. The labs are not in good condition right now. Wi-Fi is good, and the classrooms are adequate, but there are not enough rooms for students because the strength increased this year. The canteen is under construction, and sports activities have not been conducted since last year.

reviews.review_heading: A journey into the campus of SVEC.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure and campus. The campus has good labs with high-speed internet access and wide, spacious classrooms with digitalized classes. A big library with various sections of books and journals. Mess for hostelers and canteen for day scholars are also available, providing good food.

reviews.review_heading: A good college and campus of Sree Venkateswara Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but all department students are in one building, and the construction of a new building is still ongoing. Classrooms are big and digitalized. The library is also available with many books related to the course and further studies.

reviews.review_heading: I think my college is the best one to get better opportunities to get a job.
reviews.review_text: Our college have best infrastructure. Every student can utilise the laboratories sufficient to improve their skills. In our electronics and communications department, we have available laboratories to get practical knowledge about the subject. The Wi-Fi also provided in labs.

reviews.review_heading: Information About Sree Venkateswara College Of Engineering (SVCN), Nellore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, They provide all the facilities like inbuilt projectors in the classrooms for the live teaching and have all the labs of every department, Workshops, Training and placement cell and many more. Though they don't allow the usage of smartphones in the classrooms but you can use them outside of the campus and in hostels. The college provide hostel facility for both boys and girls with mess for those who live far away. They also provide bus facility for the people who live...

reviews.review_heading: Good because of faculty, good placements in 2022, good infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: They have good infrastructure and manage good cleaning. On campus, we have a huge library and labs, too. The quality of the hostel is also good, and they provide good food. If in any case we had health issues at that time, they provided good nurses and good medicines.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its teachers and course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Classrooms are neat. Labs have a high range of equipment. The library is available 24X7. The hostel facilities are good. They provide protein food. The mess and canteen facilities are available in our college. Medical facilities are available 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Our campus surroundings are decent. Every student should participate in the Swatch Barath program every Saturday from 3.40 PM to 4.30 PM. All facilities are average in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory due to discipline and good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. There should be good quality of food available in our mess and canteen. The labs and digital classrooms will help the students to understand in an easier way. Our physical trainer encourages students in physical training and teaches different sports in effective way.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides great Wi-Fi, well-furnished laboratories, and clean classrooms. Library consists of all the department books and other books. Food served in the hostel is very good. Canteen facilities are available.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around St. Joseph's College for Women Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 619 students were admitted at St. Joseph's College for Women and 498 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 498 students 67 were placed with median salary of INR 190000 and 74 students opted for higher studies. A total of 599 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at St. Joseph's College for Womenand 496 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 496 students 66 were placed with median salary of INR 250000 and 195 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 130 students were admitted at St. Joseph's College for Women and 45 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 45 students 7 were placed with median salary of INR 120000 and 1 students opted for higher studies. A total of 53 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at St. Joseph's College for Womenand 52 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 52 students 17 were placed with median salary of INR 150000.

faqs.answer: A:    St. Joseph's College for Women has placed its selected students in known and reputed companies such as Heg Mandideep, Edvizo, Conduent Business Services Llp India, Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, Princee Ram, Moggley India Pvt Ltd, Infolink Technologies, Synergy Global Technologies Inc, Hemmo Pharmaceuticals Private Limited Turbhe Navi Mumbai, Genesis Technologies Kottyam.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good education and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 1 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 10,000 per month. The average salary offered was Rs 50,000 per month. Almost 100% of students got internships in the food safety and textile industries. The top roles offered are nutritionist, preschool teacher, homemaker, health caretaker, and psychological analysis about mental care.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our college. Laboratories are better. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are available. Games are conducted. The canteen is available. The food served in the mess is good.

Medical facilities are available for emergency purposes. Students will be taken to the hospital if they get injured. Sports are conducted in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good and well-experienced. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are not hard. Few subjects are difficult in this course.

review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is excellent. Faculty members are friendly with students. They teach us again and again until we understand properly. Semester exams are very difficult but it is the correct method to conduct exams. The pass percentage is 70%.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available for various courses offered at St. Joseph's College for Women?

faqs.answer: St. Joseph's College for Women has courses such as BBA, B.Com, B.A., B.Sc., MBA/PGDM, M.Sc., M.A. which are primarily in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science. St. Joseph's College for Women has specializations such as B.Sc. specializations in Home Science, MBA/PGDM specializations in Human Resources, M.Sc. specializations in Mathematics, Chemistry, Home Science, M.A. specializations in English.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are offered by St. Joseph's College for Women?

faqs.answer: St. Joseph's College for Women is a reputed institute for BBA, B.Com, B.A., B.Sc., MBA/PGDM, M.Sc., M.A. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. St. Joseph's College for Women has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.4 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4.6 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: St. Joseph's College for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A.(English, Economics, Political Science) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A very good college which helped me know who I am.

content.Placements: Students were placed in several companies like Deloitte, HDFC Bank, and ICICI Bank. Roles offered were at the initial stage with good increments. About 60% of students got placements and rest are pursuing their Master's in various subjects, with many studying abroad and others in top universities in India.
content.Infrastructure: College had classes with whiteboards and projectors. College library was huge with complete collection of books from all departments and subjects, ranging from magazines to encyclopedias, everything was available. College hostel was for women with high security within the college premises. College canteen offers all types of food at pocket-friendly prices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Bio-Technology, Bio-Chemistry, Chemistry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is very good to take admission, but some faculty are too strict.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students joined this course. Infrastructure facilities are good. 30–40 students get selected when they pass the interview. The top roles are as biotechnology and biochemistry laboratory assistants, research work, and developing drugs and antibiotics.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are wide, there is no Wi-Fi, labs are well maintained, all laboratory-related stuff is available, there is a very wide library with complete AC, and there are all kinds of books related to study and also novels. The hostel is good but sometimes the food is not. The canteen is very good; they provide all kinds of items, including burgers, puffs, ice cream, noodles, french fries, etc. The hostel facility is good.

College library was huge with complete collection of books from all departments and subjects, ranging from magazines to encyclopedias, everything was available. College hostel was for women with high security within the college premises. College canteen offers all types of food at pocket-friendly prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is very good to take admission, but some faculty are too strict.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are wide, there is no Wi-Fi, labs are well maintained, all laboratory-related stuff is available, there is a very wide library with complete AC, and there are all kinds of books related to study and also novels. The hostel is good but sometimes the food is not. The canteen is very good; they provide all kinds of items, including burgers, puffs, ice cream, noodles, french fries, etc. The hostel facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college. Laboratories are better. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are available. Games are conducted. The canteen is available. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very strict.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Digital boards are available. Laboratories are better. The food served in the mess is decent. Canteen is available. Medical facilities are available for emergency purposes. Students will be taken to the hospital if they get injured. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of St. Joseph's College for Women.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. The infrastructure is better. Classrooms have adequate lights and fans. Laboratories are better. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The food quality is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted in this college. Hostel facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better and worthy compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: In this college, classrooms are good. It also provides a huge library. Separate laboratories are available. Our college has a good focus on sports and some other courses.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty is somewhat good but knowledgeable enough.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good for my course. Some classrooms are with digital boards. The library is too good with all the loving subjects ' books. It is too big. Hostel is somewhat strict and rooms are not that much good. 60% students choose the  hostel just to be safe. For security purpose our hostel is the best.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for colleges in Visakhapatnam for literature then it is the best option.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, and other facilities are good. Hostel food facilities aren't that great but are manageable. There are many clubs and associations for students to learn and grow. I'm not sure about the Science labs but the language lab and journalism lab are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Labs, Wi-Fi, library, canteen, medical facilities and sports ground are available in our college. Hostel facilities are available on the campus. Food is also provided in the hostel. Classrooms are neat and clean. The college is very comfortable for the students, and they have many rewards.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are good and the infrastructure is great in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure wise college is really well built and really gives you a historical feel when you enter the college. However, the quality of the food is average and a person can't expect high-quality taste in this college. But the taste is good it's not that bad too. If you want you can eat there and hang around with your friends on the campus. Medical facility and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.Be it infrastructure, placement, faculty it stands at the top.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were very spacious and good. We had an internet cafe, a very large and spacious campus gym, library with almost thousands of books and a very huge playground. The labs were also fully occupied with all the important materials and apparatus.

reviews.review_heading: I am a proud Josephine and proud of all the facilities my college provides.
reviews.review_text: I use to stay in the hostel and the food is bad. They don't allow us to keep phones or going out. I understand the discipline but then hostel life was bad but I had great friends to make it easier. There are all sort of facilities available. Canteen needs to improvise on the food menu.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Visakhapatnam apart from hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel was divided as for the local students and  NRI students. I always heard students complaining about the food served in the hostel. But now when I visit my college I see a lot of improvised versions. We did have medical, sports, and library facilities. Being in girls' college we were no less encouraged for taking up sports as a career. We had a proper coach. The library on the campus was beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for higher education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are fabulous, and there is a library with thousands of books. As I am a science student, our labs were excellent with all the equipment which we require for our experiments. Classrooms were good and are under CCTV surveillance. The hostel was good with a good guide.

reviews.review_heading: satisfied for education and extracurricular activities
reviews.review_text: the campus is fully covered with wifi and excellent infrastructure the campus looks peacefull... classrooms are well equipped with excellent library but with no air conditioner but the books are really good the mess food quality is below average and canteen..

highlights.summary: The Karnataka PGCET 2026 exam for admission to the MBA and MCA courses will be held on May 14, 2026. For the ME/MTech course, the exam is scheduled for May 23, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RJS First Grade College provides offline programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Business & Management Studies, Science and IT & Software. UG programs include B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM, MCA and M.Com.

faqs.answer: A:    RJS First Grade College is a well-known institution for B.Com, BCA, B.Sc, BBA, BVA, M.Com, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. RJS First Grade College has course specializations in Biotechnology.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at RJS First Grade College?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Best for academic purposes only, but not for campus selection.

review_content.Placements: There are only 4-5 students who get placed per class. The highest package is 4.5 LPA and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Wipro, Capgemini, and Wellsfargo are the top recruiting companies. No internship is provided by the college, only interviews took place.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two computer labs and a science lab for B.Sc. students. Wi-Fi is there, but the password is not given to students. The library is available, and in fact, it is in good condition. The food is good at the hostel.
review_content.Faculty: Some teachers are qualified, but some teachers do not make the topics understandable. But the faculty is manageable. It is relevant and it does have some effect on the students' industry. Except that the guidance is weak, everything is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: College is overall good, we can join with little less budget, Fees are deducted based on merit.

review_content.Placements: No one were placed from the B.Sc. biotech, but got to know that other courses like B.Com or others got placed. Top companies like Toyota got opportunities to enter. Need training for job too, only exams and tests are the most important things that are focused here.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is only girls hostel, so no idea about the hostel infra, but the college is pretty decent. We have a canteen that was never opened more than a month. But there are hotels and other stuff very close to the college. College canteen was open only for few weeks then again was closed. The classrooms need to be a bit upgraded.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025

Companies offered are insurance services, financial services, tax advisory services. Internships are also given by these companies.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library with lot of books available for the course. It has a wide collection of books and are very helpful for reference. Classrooms are very hygienic and are well-maintained. They maintain proper sanitation every day. We have games and sports also on campus but we don't have a canteen in our college.

highlights.summary: Mumbai University Merit List 2025 has been released, detailed by course, round, and category, for Bunts Sangha s Higher Education Institutions admission to UG and PG courses.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Bunts Sangha's Higher Education Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.Sc., B.Com and BBM/BMS courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM and M.Com. The Bunts Sangha's Higher Education Institutions course fee ranges between INR 29,442 to 4,90,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: You should take admission to this college at your own risk.

review_content.Placements: In our college, only 20% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies like KFC, Athena BPO, etc., visited our campus. Internships were not available.
review_content.Infrastructure: We could have used Wi-Fi only for ten minutes. Labs were available but they were not useful. Our classrooms were very clean. Every classroom had air conditioning, which was very good for students. The food in the canteen was not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, staff, teachers, etc.

review_content.Placements: Few students got placements. Students who secure good ranks are mostly the ones who get internship or placement. Students get internship and placements which are based on their ranks and course. About 20 - 25% students got internship and placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are very good. Classes are well maintained and clean. Everything is perfect but only the food of canteen is not good in taste. Library is well maintained with good quality of books. Labs are well placed.

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

overview_faqs.answer: BSc IT graduates can get an initial annual salary package between INR 3 LPA to Rs 6 LPA. Candidates with and BSc IT degree can get profiles such as Programmer, System Engineer, Software Engineer, Network Administrator, Hardware Engineer, Tester, and System Analyst.However, the salary you get also depends on your skills and expertise in a particular area or the company or location you choose to work for.

review_summary.college_name: Bunts Sangha’s Higher Education Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: There is a good environment in the college. Proper hygiene is maintained.

content.Placements: The package offered ranges from 4-5 LPA. Companies like Tech Mahindra, Wipro, etc., hire students. Above 70% of students get placed. Many roles are offered for the level of skills in that particular field.
content.Infrastructure: It has nice classrooms. All floors are clean and well-maintained. It has proper hygiene and a very good sports room with indoor games like carrom, chess, etc. I enjoyed my college life in this college with a good and proper environment. It has well-equipped computer labs and modern tools, which make hands-on learning effective.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Bunts Sanghas Shetty College Review.

content.Placements: Almost 60% to 70% students were placed in B.Sc. IT course. The highest package offered in B.Sc. IT was 44 Lacs per annum and the lowest package offered in B.Sc. IT was 2.5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies in B.Sc. IT were: Tech Mahindra, NTT Data, Capgemini (50 percent for the past 10 years, with a high of 52 percent). Roles offered included: Software Developer, Web Developer, Systems Analyst, Cybersecurity Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and Lecture Halls: Spacious and well-equipped. Computer Labs: High-performance computers with high-speed internet connectivity. Dedicated labs for specific subjects, including server and networking labs. Library: Digital library with printed resources and study areas. The quality of the facilities in my college was superb and amazing. The quality of the food in the canteen was average. The quality of the medical facilities was much better than any other college. The sports and games were also the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: You should take admission to this college at your own risk.

content.Placements: In our college, only 20% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies like KFC, Athena BPO, etc., visited our campus. Internships were not available.
content.Infrastructure: We could have used Wi-Fi only for ten minutes. Labs were available but they were not useful. Our classrooms were very clean. Every classroom had air conditioning, which was very good for students. The food in the canteen was not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, staff, teachers, etc.

content.Placements: Few students got placements. Students who secure good ranks are mostly the ones who get internship or placement. Students get internship and placements which are based on their ranks and course. About 20 - 25% students got internship and placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are very good. Classes are well maintained and clean. Everything is perfect but only the food of canteen is not good in taste. Library is well maintained with good quality of books. Labs are well placed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bunts Sangha’s Higher Education Institutions.

content.Placements: About 20-30% of the students got placed in good companies, mostly in MNCs like TCS, Wipro and Mahindra and Mahindra. The placement department is also good. The management makes sure that the best companies arrive to take students. The college gave pre-placement training to every student to make them ready for the interview.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure, but canteen food is not that good. The outside area of our college is very crowded.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: You can get a degree certificate and good knowledge about your stream at an affordable fee.

review_content.Placements: The placements are average when compared with the previous two years 2020-2022 because of the pandemic. But previous years before the pandemic, placements were good in our college. Above 70% of students were placed in on-campus placements. The top companies visited for campus recruitment interviews are HCL, Tech Mahindra, TCS, and Amazon.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you don't join this college because there are no placements.

content.Placements: I passed out in 2022; there are no placements in the college. There is no recruitment for the mining branch; other branches have placements and get jobs; the package is nearly up to INR 5 lacs per annum, and the lowest package per annum is INR 1 lacs. There are no internships at the college.
content.Infrastructure: There are not many facilities in the college; labs have all the necessary equipment and computer labs for students. A big library is there for students to prepare for government exams. There are no Wi-Fi facilities, the hostel food is very bad, and the washrooms are also very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the atmosphere of this college.

content.Placements: Placements are held in the final year of our course. Many start-ups hire students through the assessment and interview processes. The starting salary packages are 2 LPA, 3 LPA, and 3.5 LPA. Faculty members are very friendly regarding placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college contains many branches. Every branch has laboratories for practicals and ECE labs have kits for practicals. Library facility is provided. Students can borrow and return books from the library using their ID cards. Hostel is provided to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: You can get a degree certificate and good knowledge about your stream at an affordable fee.

content.Placements: The placements are average when compared with the previous two years 2020-2022 because of the pandemic. But previous years before the pandemic, placements were good in our college. Above 70% of students were placed in on-campus placements. The top companies visited for campus recruitment interviews are HCL, Tech Mahindra, TCS, and Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. The classrooms are built with good infrastructure. The labs have proper instruments and systems for CSE department. individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because it has many good things like placements and other cultural activities.

content.Placements: Almost 95-98% of the students in our course got placed because the classes were based on the technical. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. The highest salary offered is Rs. 1,00,000 per month. Top Recruiting companies are Flipkart, Amazon, Wipro, etc. Top roles offered in our course is AE in power plants. We get more knowledge and experience along with salary packages. The lowest salary offered in our course is Rs. 23,000 per month. The highest salary offered in our course is more than Rs. 2,00,000 per month. More than 87% of the student got internships in Power Grid and some other companies.

description: Abdulkalam Institute of Technological Sciences cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Abdulkalam Institute of Technological Sciences TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 55273 and 112179 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) and B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 55273, 59303 and 63600, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Abdulkalam Institute of Technological Sciences. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Abdulkalam Institute of Technological Sciences MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 46202. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 37669, and the 2023 cutoff was 37455 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

As per Shiksha verified reviews, Thangavelu Engineering College has a rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 3.6 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Thangavelu Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good for all, and the lab facilities are also good.

content.Placements: The students' placement percentage ranges from 72%. The 80% students got internships from companies like TCS, etc. There are top recruiting companies, they are Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Amazon, HCL, Dell, Infosys, Tata Business Support Service Limited, Ford, Royal Enfield, etc. The packages differ based on selected courses.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, the college has more space, and each class environment is friendly. There are smart classes available. The auditorium is big with air conditioning, and they conduct many special events. They conduct sports meets, an Annual meet, and the canteen is good with good food. But the hostel is not bad. The labs are a conditioned and well-maintained library with 15,000 books and articles. There is no Wi-Fi available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Thangavelu Engineering College is a good college with good infrastructure and facilities

content.Placements: Thangavelu Engineering College is one of the best placement colleges in Chennai. This college brought more reputed organizations like Accenture, Teach Mahendra, Zoho, IBM, TCS, and Infosys for these college campus interviews. That company offered 4-15 lacs per annum salary packages. 90% of students placed in 2021 passed out batch.
content.Infrastructure: Thangavelu Engineering College has more spacious classrooms and Hi Teach laboratories here at this college. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities on the college campus. A good library is also available in this college. This college sports grounds facilities were excellent. Indoor sports grounds facilities are also here at this college. This college hostel foods taste is very good. Emergency medical facilities are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, facilities, teaching, and placements.

content.Placements: Our branch is EEE, the average salary package will be 3.5 LPA, and the staff will be very friendly with students. It has good placements and top recruiting companies are hiring. A good percentage of students get placement. For internships, after 3rd year we can choose and get the certificate.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the classrooms are good. In library facilities are good, and sports are provided every week once. The mess and canteen are very good. The facilities are good. Labs are good and they explain every topic. I enjoyed studying as a student in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and infrastructure. Facilities can be improved.

content.Placements: The placement drive take place in the final year. The companies coming to college are not top ones and the offers are also not that great. Job vacancies were more but the companies preferred skilled students. The college should focus on improving students skill and not on their marks.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good but the maintenance is not up to the mark. there is a big ground but again it was not maintained well. The college campus needs to be cleaned properly.
content.Faculty: The college faculty is friendly with students. The course curriculum is also up to the mark and useful for students. Exams are conducted from time to time properly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good placements, good teachers, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: More than 60% of students were selected for internships. Now top roles are offered to AI. As a fresher, you get jobs with a salary package of 3 LPA to 4 LPA. More than 50 members in our course were placed in campus selection. It will depend on the performance of students.
content.Infrastructure: It has good facilities and good quality of infrastructure. All rooms have power and are available 24 hours a day. They provide good maintenance in the canteen. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained. Sports and games are conducted for 1 hour every week.

hostel_campus.college_name: Thangavelu Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for all, and the lab facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, the college has more space, and each class environment is friendly. There are smart classes available. The auditorium is big with air conditioning, and they conduct many special events. They conduct sports meets, an Annual meet, and the canteen is good with good food. But the hostel is not bad. The labs are a conditioned and well-maintained library with 15,000 books and articles. There is no Wi-Fi available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Thangavelu Engineering College is a good college with good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text: Thangavelu Engineering College has more spacious classrooms and Hi Teach laboratories here at this college. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities on the college campus. A good library is also available in this college. This college sports grounds facilities were excellent. Indoor sports grounds facilities are also here at this college. This college hostel foods taste is very good. Emergency medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, facilities, teaching, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the classrooms are good. In library facilities are good, and sports are provided every week once. The mess and canteen are very good. The facilities are good. Labs are good and they explain every topic. I enjoyed studying as a student in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and infrastructure. Facilities can be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but the maintenance is not up to the mark. there is a big ground but again it was not maintained well. The college campus needs to be cleaned properly.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, good teachers, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has good facilities and good quality of infrastructure. All rooms have power and are available 24 hours a day. They provide good maintenance in the canteen. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained. Sports and games are conducted for 1 hour every week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a ragging-free campus, and you can be friendly to your seniors.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and Wi-Fi. There are labs for physics, chemistry, electronics, mechanics, civil, etc. Everylab has a good infrastructure and it is fully maintained. There is 24x7 electricity in the hostel. There are some exceptions too, due to some emergencies. Unlike other colleges, here you can have electrical appliances of approximately 1500W. The mess food is good enough to eat.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college within Chennai city.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a neat infrastructure with well-planted trees, well-equipped classrooms, laboratories, playgrounds, separate seminar hall, AV room, canteen, and separate hostels for boys and girls, etc. Drinking water and restrooms were kept on every floor, but the maintenance was a little poor. Overall the infrastructure was above average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institute to opt for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled and has highly specialised laboratories for all departments. Our college provides support to every sport and cultural events. It also has a good canteen facility and library. There is a good medical facility for students, and also more than 3 hospitals are available nearby our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and should improve.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-equipped laboratory and playground. Comparing to the restroom and drinking water all are good. Medical facilities are also available in the college. The quality of the food is also good but the canteen size and products kept there are small while comparing to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are available here in a good manner.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure with neat and clean surrounding. The playground is huge and used for various sports activities. The campus is regularly cleaned. The infrastructure is provided with all basic facilities. All buildings are provided with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The only bad thing about the college is placements.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities in our college are okay, and the classrooms are not bad. Canteens are not good, and it's not fully Wi-Fi enabled campus. The hostel is average. Food served is poor. The college is located in OMR, Chennai. Bus facilities are okay, but buses are not in good condition. The library and computer lab are available here but not in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Waste of money and time because there is no placement.
reviews.review_text: Simple but not worthy one compared to the fee they are charging. The washrooms and drinking water areas will be very poor and unhygienic. Our college is not a Wi-Fi enabled campus so please don't agree if they say it is Wi-Fi enabled. There is no proper coaching for the students who come under sports quota and not even a kit room we have, very poor regarding sports. Hostel food is the worst thing to ever taste in your life other than the hostel rooms will be very comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Except for placements, everything is good in this college.
reviews.review_text: Fortunately, there are many trees in our college, which is very good to hear and a lot of space to sit and eat. More spaces are also available for games and sports. I will rate 3.5 stars for the college infrastructure. The only disadvantage is walking the distance between college and bus stop is a bit longer. No Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Classrooms are good with 4-5 fans, blackboard, benches and windows. Canteen is available for both hostlers and day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of those mentioned problems.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was very bad compared to other colleges. Not even an auditorium was in a good manner. Classrooms are okay, but not up to the mark. The drinking water filter repairs often. Labs are not air-conditioned. They will only switch-on during university practicals for externals. Most of the computers don't work. Sports are not well-encouraged in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Thangavelu Engineering College is the place for fun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not bad. We had proper lab facilities. Roads connecting the college was the major problem during rainy days. There are no facilities for sports as most of the cricket ground is occupied by parking college buses. We have a volleyball court.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Caarmel College Of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: There is a well organised and managed placement cell working in the campus. During my college years from 2012-2016 every year they have conducted job fairs and campus interviews a lot of my batchmates as well as my seniors got placed on different well reputed companies around India. A GOOD SALARY PACKAGE WAS ALSO ENSURED.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in a beautiful peaceful locality. Plenty of facilities including Wi-Fi and good network coverage. The campus is well equipied with great infrastructure include good lab facilities for all departments. And canteen and hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: If you have the ability to learn yourself and looking for just a degree, you can try this college

review_content.Placements: For core branches like mechanical, civil and EEE, there is no placement drive. Very few companies come to college for placement and for CS and IT branches, the college provides some off-campus drives. The college gives less importance to placements. In my batch, no one got placed, and in all branches, maximum 20 might have got placements out of 400 students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Even though the college is in a remote place, the management is trying to make the infrastructure better. During my final year, so many plans were proposed and some of them had been done. The college labs, classrooms and the library are good and they will meet up with the standards. The ground, the canteen and the hostel are maintained well. When I joined the college, the condition was worse but gradually, they made it in good condition. For infrastructure and all other facilities, I can give a rating of 2.5 out of 5.

review_summary.college_name: Believers Church Caarmel Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is awesome, but some students will dissatisfy due to some of the management policies.

content.Placements: Caarmel Engineering College has an active placement cell. They organize campus recruitment programme yearly. Most of the participating institutions are IT based companies, they need software developers and programming associates. College has an active IEEE students branch, which co-ordinates the recruitment procedure. From the last 3 years, we can conclude that the rate of students participating in the campus recruitments is decreased. The main reason is due to the bond/agreement which was put forward by the recruiting company. The another reason for the above mentioned problem is that the lack of core institutions, because the students from departments other than software based are not willing to work as a software developers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of Caarmel College Of Engineering.

content.Placements: There is a well organised and managed placement cell working in the campus. During my college years from 2012-2016 every year they have conducted job fairs and campus interviews a lot of my batchmates as well as my seniors got placed on different well reputed companies around India. A GOOD SALARY PACKAGE WAS ALSO ENSURED.
content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in a beautiful peaceful locality. Plenty of facilities including Wi-Fi and good network coverage. The campus is well equipied with great infrastructure include good lab facilities for all departments. And canteen and hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you have the ability to learn yourself and looking for just a degree, you can try this college

content.Placements: For core branches like mechanical, civil and EEE, there is no placement drive. Very few companies come to college for placement and for CS and IT branches, the college provides some off-campus drives. The college gives less importance to placements. In my batch, no one got placed, and in all branches, maximum 20 might have got placements out of 400 students.
content.Infrastructure: Even though the college is in a remote place, the management is trying to make the infrastructure better. During my final year, so many plans were proposed and some of them had been done. The college labs, classrooms and the library are good and they will meet up with the standards. The ground, the canteen and the hostel are maintained well. When I joined the college, the condition was worse but gradually, they made it in good condition. For infrastructure and all other facilities, I can give a rating of 2.5 out of 5.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Carmel Engineering College is an awesome college with best known for its scenic beauty. This college is located on Perunadu Ranni on a hilly area. So from the college we can see a very good scenic beauty. The college comes with very good faculties and Teachers. Now the college has got a new very good hygienic Canteen. The lab also has very good equipment’s. Overall it’s a very good college.

paragraphs: Pyramid College of Business and Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Pyramid College of Business and Technology considers scores in CMAT, CBSE 12th, and PSEB 12th for admission to specific courses.Pyramid College of Business and Technologyoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 93,000 - 1,42,550. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,20,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It helps to enhance both professionally and personally.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are various courses available that provide placements as well. However, I opted for a Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com), which does not provide placement. However, during the course, they provide internships at companies like Deloitte, Manubhai Jewellers, EY, BSE, etc., which give more exposure and industry experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well maintained and includes a library, canteen, classrooms, gymkhana, and a turf that hosts a variety of sports events. Classrooms are clean, well maintained, and have AC. The library has proper seating arrangements and a good atmosphere. The canteen is hygienic and offers good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: The college promised 75% placements, which they provided. The college had many companies and firms offering students internships to gain job experience. Overall, the placement cell was very good, and students with higher academic scores received better placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had a nice infrastructure for students. As the college was a bit old. The infrastructure was not as updated compared to other colleges in the area. But the college was working on renovation and improvements in washrooms and corridors. Also, the whole college was air-conditioned.

review_summary.college_name: KES Shroff College of Arts and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Financial Markets - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong placement opportunities.

content.Placements: I’m from the FYBFM batch at KES Shroff College. Around 65 percent of students are placed with top firms like Deloitte, KPMG, and ICICI Bank. Packages range from 2–7 LPA. Many got internships at firms like Motilal Oswal and HDFC Life, with roles in finance, marketing, and operations.
content.Infrastructure: KES Shroff College has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards, Wi-Fi, and air-conditioning. The library is spacious. It has a good collection of finance and management books, along with digital resources. The campus has computer labs, seminar halls, and a clean canteen serving decent food. Medical and first-aid facilities are available on campus. The college also supports sports and cultural activities, with good indoor and outdoor sports arrangements. Overall, the infrastructure is modern and well-maintained. They create a comfortable environment for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and nice infrastructure for a self-financed course.

content.Placements: The companies that offer placements are good, and many students secure college placements directly from campus. The highest package is 6 LPA, the average package is 3.8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. There have been approximately 80 offers from 18 companies to about 70 students, reflecting the overall average package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent, with air conditioning in classrooms and maintained cleanliness. The classrooms are well-ventilated, clean, and often air-conditioned. Some students initially used an annex but have been moved to newer buildings, which are described as very good. Many students who are in the old building enjoy good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It helps to enhance both professionally and personally.

content.Placements: In our college, there are various courses available that provide placements as well. However, I opted for a Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com), which does not provide placement. However, during the course, they provide internships at companies like Deloitte, Manubhai Jewellers, EY, BSE, etc., which give more exposure and industry experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well maintained and includes a library, canteen, classrooms, gymkhana, and a turf that hosts a variety of sports events. Classrooms are clean, well maintained, and have AC. The library has proper seating arrangements and a good atmosphere. The canteen is hygienic and offers good food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good placements.

content.Placements: The college promised 75% placements, which they provided. The college had many companies and firms offering students internships to gain job experience. Overall, the placement cell was very good, and students with higher academic scores received better placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a nice infrastructure for students. As the college was a bit old. The infrastructure was not as updated compared to other colleges in the area. But the college was working on renovation and improvements in washrooms and corridors. Also, the whole college was air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a pretty good college because of staff, and faculty members.

content.Placements: The lowest package is 5 LPA. The highest package is 15 LPA. The average percentage of our batch is above 70%. Companies such as Tata and Axis Bank hired 60% of students for internships. HR, marketing, and accounting are the top roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The environment, staff, and faculty members are good. They teach well and encourage students to participate in various activities. The college canteen is not that great, and sometimes I dislike the behavior of the canteen staff, but overall it's a good experience.

Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:
