For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 25.56. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 61.22 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at KES Shroff College of Arts and Commerce was 25.56.
For other categories, candidates can use the provided filters.

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

KES Shroff College of Arts and Commerce MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 96.39 to 94.65 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 94.65. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, and 2023.

For B.Com admission across multiple specialisations, the 2025 last round cutoff percentage ranged between 42.5 and 56.67. Of all the courses, B.Com. in Financial Markets was the most competitive for admission.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: KES Shroff College has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards, Wi-Fi, and air-conditioning. The library is spacious. It has a good collection of finance and management books, along with digital resources. The campus has computer labs, seminar halls, and a clean canteen serving decent food. Medical and first-aid facilities are available on campus. The college also supports sports and cultural activities, with good indoor and outdoor sports arrangements. Overall, the infrastructure is modern a...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and nice infrastructure for a self-financed course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, with air conditioning in classrooms and maintained cleanliness. The classrooms are well-ventilated, clean, and often air-conditioned. Some students initially used an annex but have been moved to newer buildings, which are described as very good. Many students who are in the old building enjoy good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It helps to enhance both professionally and personally.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained and includes a library, canteen, classrooms, gymkhana, and a turf that hosts a variety of sports events. Classrooms are clean, well maintained, and have AC. The library has proper seating arrangements and a good atmosphere. The canteen is hygienic and offers good food.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college had a nice infrastructure for students. As the college was a bit old. The infrastructure was not as updated compared to other colleges in the area. But the college was working on renovation and improvements in washrooms and corridors. Also, the whole college was air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a pretty good college because of staff, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The environment, staff, and faculty members are good. They teach well and encourage students to participate in various activities. The college canteen is not that great, and sometimes I dislike the behavior of the canteen staff, but overall it's a good experience.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facilities are only in the library and computer labs, with no access for students. KES doesn't have hostel facilities. The canteen provides good food. The sports and games activities at the college are good. It promotes the participation of every student.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good and also faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure and it is maintained too. Classrooms are neat and tidy with cleanliness. The quality of food is very good and up to the mark. College has a good big turf for sports also many sports-related events like Antarag are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: I am impressed by their faculty, facilities, infrastructure, etc. It is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is worth the fees. There are science and IT labs. Library quality is also great no disturbance at all. Wi-Fi is not given. There are no hostel facilities in Kes. But food in canteens is well prepared. Sports facilities are also in the gym khana.

reviews.review_heading: Completely expected and unplanned decision to take admission but it is not bad.
reviews.review_text: There are smart boards in every class, which help in case we need to put up presentations, videos, images, etc., for learning. We have multiple labs, and there is a huge turf and gym for sports as well. Our library is air-conditioned, and recently, all of our classes also had air conditioners installed.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing infrastructure and attentive teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is really good, neat and clean, as well as pocket-friendly for students. The quality of the food is good, as per the price. Also, we have a library where you can sit and read books or else you can borrow books from home as well. They have a wide range of books and novels.

reviews.review_heading: KES Shroff is a unique college to create opportunities in future .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Classrooms, libraries or other labs or rooms are fully air-conditioned, even though we are provided with Wi-Fi facilities. We even have our own college turf. The canteens and mess food are kind of acceptable and cheap.

reviews.review_heading: COLLEGE - A real-world Experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus was really amazing. The college has a Turf which is very much beneficial for the students interested in outdoor sports. The college has various labs, computer labs, libraries for the students, auditorium, etc. This is very advantageous for the students. The college also has Digital Boards attached in every class. The college Canteen was also the best place to chill and relax.

reviews.review_heading: Educational quality is really good.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities that a campus or a college needs are provided with well-maintained equipment (the library is the most important and most valuable area in our college, classrooms are big enough to hold 70 to 80 students at a time, the auditorium is well maintained and playground turf is also available). The quality of the food is pretty average but some of their special dishes are the best. A medical emergency facility is also available at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is okay. Library is good with good AC. Classrooms are clean but ventilation still not yet good. E-learning through smart is provided since this year which is good for teachers and students. Canteen food is good. Sports opportunities are well provided. Other facilities in curricular activities are well provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are neat and have good air-conditioners. The food served in the canteen is clean. The library has many books. We have computer labs.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the SAM College of Engineering and Technology:

faqs.answer: A:    SAM College of Engineering and Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 6 UG and 7 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. SAM College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, Production Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at SAM College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    SAM College of Engineering and Technology has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, After 1th Diploma to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. SAM College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, Production Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does SAM College of Engineering and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by SAM College of Engineering and Technology is up to 948. Good thing to know is that SAM College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at SAM College of Engineering and Technology?

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the low-quality education and placement in the college.

review_content.Placements: I'm BE (ECE) student. Honestly, there were no placements for technical jobs, and the placements are common for all the branches. On the name of placement activity, they called a few BPO companies, and the average salary package was 1.8 LPA for more than 9 hours daily working. Out of more than 400 students, a few joined those BPO jobs, and after a few months, they resigned and came back, and no one got internships from the college. The placement cell was there when I was graduated from the college, but it was not efficient. They were doing work for formalities only, and they don't have contact or tie-ups with companies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty, good placement cell, but not better infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placement is good but not great as only some companies visit the campus. Some of our seniors are placed in some companies. As for mechanical and civil engineering, the campus selection is good as compared to computer science and electrical students. Our college is a tie with some companies like TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good but not better on the campus. The laboratory is not in proper conditions. The quality of food is not better in the college as outside of college. The sorts and games tournaments are organised by the faculty members of our college. The library of our college provides all types of books but of the old edition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is not my dream college.

review_content.Placements: Average placement with an annual package of 2.5 to 3.5 lakhs. The companies which come are not that good they have different bonds and policies which can trouble you. And once you got placed in the companies, the college forces you to work in that company, otherwise they would blacklist the college. This is what the college says.
review_content.Infrastructure: An average infrastructure with moderate classrooms and library. The library staff members are very rude. Even if they have a book, they don't give it to you. The campus is not that big. No WiFi is there on the campus. The canteen is not good. Poor bus service- less buses. No hostel. The quality of food in the canteen is not good.

faqs.answer: SAM College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%. Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance (i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc.) duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICT

review_summary.college_name: SAM College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college has good faculty and infrastructure. Low fees is a plus point.

content.Placements: A maximum of 20% students are placed from our college because of lack of companies. The highest package offered is 18 LPA (Amazon), the lowest is 2 LPA and the average is 4-5 LPA. Amazon, TCS, Sterling and many famous companies are recruiting from our course. 60% students got internships from my course by LinkedIn, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Friendly, supportive and experienced faculty members are available in the college. Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi, 2-3 labs, enough classrooms and a library is available. Hostels are not provided by the college because they are under construction. Food is the best in mess and canteen. Medical facility as well as a hospital is available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is neither the best nor the worst.

content.Placements: Our senior batch didn't have enough placement opportunities. Only five students of our batch got placed with salaries of Rs. 10,000-15,000 per month with no other incentives. Other department students have an enormous amount of placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The surroundings of our college are green and natural. The campus has a clean and green environment for students. At many places, they have built a bench to sit down, and you can enjoy the nature sitting there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the low-quality education and placement in the college.

content.Placements: I'm BE (ECE) student. Honestly, there were no placements for technical jobs, and the placements are common for all the branches. On the name of placement activity, they called a few BPO companies, and the average salary package was 1.8 LPA for more than 9 hours daily working. Out of more than 400 students, a few joined those BPO jobs, and after a few months, they resigned and came back, and no one got internships from the college. The placement cell was there when I was graduated from the college, but it was not efficient. They were doing work for formalities only, and they don't have contact or tie-ups with companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty, good placement cell, but not better infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placement is good but not great as only some companies visit the campus. Some of our seniors are placed in some companies. As for mechanical and civil engineering, the campus selection is good as compared to computer science and electrical students. Our college is a tie with some companies like TCS.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good but not better on the campus. The laboratory is not in proper conditions. The quality of food is not better in the college as outside of college. The sorts and games tournaments are organised by the faculty members of our college. The library of our college provides all types of books but of the old edition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is not my dream college.

content.Placements: Average placement with an annual package of 2.5 to 3.5 lakhs. The companies which come are not that good they have different bonds and policies which can trouble you. And once you got placed in the companies, the college forces you to work in that company, otherwise they would blacklist the college. This is what the college says.
content.Infrastructure: An average infrastructure with moderate classrooms and library. The library staff members are very rude. Even if they have a book, they don't give it to you. The campus is not that big. No WiFi is there on the campus. The canteen is not good. Poor bus service- less buses. No hostel. The quality of food in the canteen is not good.

paragraphs: International Institute of Aviation admissiokns are both entrance and merit-based. The institute offers courses in affiliation withAerospace and Aviation Sector Skill Council, Bengaluru Central Universityand it is the only Institute providing manpower for private jet operations world-wide. IIA has won seven consecutive awards for the 'Best Training and Placements in India & Overseas'. The Institute has collaborations with the Airport Authority of India, Directorate of General of Civil Aviation and Jayam Aviation for the On Job Trainings (OJT). IIA offers a total of five degree and advanced diploma courses in areas of Aviation Management and Hospitality and Travel Tourism. Interested students can read the article to know about International Institute of Aviation admissions.

faqs.answer: Yes, the Indian Institute of Astrophysics (IIA) in Bangalore accepts Karnataka 2nd PUC scores for admission to its BBA program. content.Placements: Some students get placed from our college in some small companies. Placement opportunities are not affordable here. content.Infrastructure: We have some facilities like computer labs, projectors, a canteen, Wi-Fi, and a library. Hostels are near the college only. Girls' and boys' hostels are outside the college. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 70,000 to 1,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 10 UG and 7 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Computer Science Engineering.

review_summary.college_name: Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It provided good placements in 2024-25. It has good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The real percentage of students who get placed is around 60-70 percent. The highest package offered is 45 LPA, but in reality, a senior of mine got placed with a package of 35 LPA. Again, another student got placed with a package of 55 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Deloitte, Microsoft, and other startup technology companies.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE course has the best infrastructure. Classrooms, labs, and the library are very well-equipped. It also has Wi-Fi. The quality of the hostel is impressive compared to other hostels. Reviews for the hostel are always mixed. Overall, it is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: A minimum of 30 percent of students are placed. The highest is 42 LPA that is in Amazon. Top recruiting companies are Cognizant and Accenture, and many students got internships at Miracle Visakhapatnam. Data analyst is the role offered in my course. AI intern roles at PeopleTech are offered, and many students got selected.
content.Infrastructure: We have computer labs and chemistry labs with Wi-Fi and also fully equipped infrastructure. The food is good because every week we are having three times chicken. We have one RMP doctor for every block at the hostel. I forgot to mention that NCC and NSS sports are available to participate in, and we will receive certificates for those sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Talented students can get jobs in any college. It’s based on you. All the facilities are helpful.

content.Placements: The maximum percentage of students passing in my college while completing the 4th year is high. I don't know about the package because I haven't applied. I know the average is 3-4 LPA. Internships are a personal choice. If students are interested, they join, with full support from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are good. All the necessary labs and workshops are available. I don't know about the hostel because I stayed outside. If you're middle-class, staying outside the hostel costs around 4k monthly. Overall, everything is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The review of KAKINADA INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY.

content.Placements: Its not that bad for placements, but decent. The Kiet students are more selected than compared to Kiet+ students. They will divide the students into three groups and move them into placements. The first group will be selected more for the placements, and next to the other batches.
content.Infrastructure: Decent classrooms with IFPs. The classrooms are not ventilated in some areas. The hostel is also a decent one. The Wi-Fi here is very nice, with a moderate speed everywhere on the campus. The food in the hostel is decent, but during holidays it tastes better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has good placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest package is 6 LPA. The institution has a strong focus on placements, and a significant number of companies visit the campus. 60% of students got internships from our course. Recently, many students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has AC classrooms and high-speed Wi-Fi. Canteen food is excellent. There are modern labs, smart classrooms, and a tech-driven campus. Hostel facilities are decent, and the food served is good. Overall, the college experience varied between moderate and satisfactory. The canteen contains a variety of snacks and healthy juices. The overall quality of food has received mixed reviews.

faqs.answer:
Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examinati

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology goes up to 1770.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It provided good placements in 2024-25. It has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The CSE course has the best infrastructure. Classrooms, labs, and the library are very well-equipped. It also has Wi-Fi. The quality of the hostel is impressive compared to other hostels. Reviews for the hostel are always mixed. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have computer labs and chemistry labs with Wi-Fi and also fully equipped infrastructure. The food is good because every week we are having three times chicken. We have one RMP doctor for every block at the hostel. I forgot to mention that NCC and NSS sports are available to participate in, and we will receive certificates for those sports.

reviews.review_heading: Talented students can get jobs in any college. It’s based on you. All the facilities are helpful.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are good. All the necessary labs and workshops are available. I don't know about the hostel because I stayed outside. If you're middle-class, staying outside the hostel costs around 4k monthly. Overall, everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: The review of KAKINADA INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY.
reviews.review_text: Decent classrooms with IFPs. The classrooms are not ventilated in some areas. The hostel is also a decent one. The Wi-Fi here is very nice, with a moderate speed everywhere on the campus. The food in the hostel is decent, but during holidays it tastes better.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has AC classrooms and high-speed Wi-Fi. Canteen food is excellent. There are modern labs, smart classrooms, and a tech-driven campus. Hostel facilities are decent, and the food served is good. Overall, the college experience varied between moderate and satisfactory. The canteen contains a variety of snacks and healthy juices. The overall quality of food has received mixed reviews.

reviews.review_heading: It's based on your wish and I want to say it's decent.
reviews.review_text: Overall college was good for those who study well as well as people who will enjoy like other engineering colleges. I want to say something, every engineering college was the same. People who study well get a job at any college, not based on college, nothing else to say.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for gaining knowledge and offers a more beautiful natural environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well maintained by the college. The Wi-Fi in college is sometimes good and sometimes it will not have a better signal. The labs are only for diplomas. The library is the most peaceful and the best place to get more knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and support lecture environment so good beautiful location.
reviews.review_text: My course was electronics and communication engineering in B.Tech. Library, labs, and classrooms were available. Wi-Fi quality was good and high-speed networking was there. Labs were also cleaned and power supply was provided. Canteen food quality was good and all food items were available. Games and sports were very good, and practiced by my PT sir, he played well games.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy because a lot of placements are provided by the KIET management .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of KIET is very nice. The college is divided into 3 parts one is KIET, KIET+ and other one is KIET womens. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and the library are very nice. Medical facilities are also good. KIET management conduct sports tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for a valid B.Tech certificate of JNTUK.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. The mess food is not good and sometimes we have to adjust in this college. Mosquitoes are more at this college because Korangi forest is near the college. About studies, they will not say anything and we read our own. It is not worth our fee. But clubs are useful to us in this college. We are having NCC, NSS, sports, clubs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Kakinada Engineering College Life.
reviews.review_text: My hostel facility is very good compared to other college hostels. It provides a locker for each student with a bed, cart, and pillow to accommodate the hostel. We have to enroll our name in the student section office which in held in college premises. The hostel is full of security. It is good to live a peaceful life.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, hygienic classrooms, good sports equipment, good food, big ground, a pleasant atmosphere, and good-condition buses for day scholars traveling. A doctor was available at any time. Medicine was provided free of cost. There is a clean mess and a clean canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good for the study and other activities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and nice. This college has 4 blocks. These 4 blocks look parallel and full greenery, a good look for the college. And labs are available and classrooms are good and each class has a projector. A library is also available. Mess food is good with non-veg three times a week. Medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: A review about Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text:
From my side, I can’t say it’s too bad or too good. It’s okay, I can say. We shouldn’t expect too much luxury, right? We have Wi-Fi facilities, good classroom facilities, and a library, but we don’t have proper labs. In my four years, I didn’t attend any lab.
Regarding the canteen, it’s the worst. We don’t have proper food in the canteen, only chips are available. That’s it. Hostel food is also average. We have medical facilities.
Our college is famous for games. If we have talent in different g...

reviews.review_heading: College is much satisfying because faculty, good placements, and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. In present times, they have developed the infrastructure very well. The college has a robotics lab, Khub, SCB, and many more. All the classrooms are well-furnished. The hostel is good, and the food is also nice. In college, there are NCC, NSS, and medical facilities available.
